Durable Telescoping Retractor Hardware for Trade Show & Event Use

Professional-grade telescoping retractor hardware engineered for reliable banner display performance. Features durable aluminum construction with flip-lever telescoping pole system for quick setup and height adjustment at trade shows, retail locations, and professional events.

Key Hardware Features

  • Durable aluminum construction for long-lasting professional use
  • Low-profile aluminum base with black or silver end-cap options
  • Flip-lever telescoping pole enables simple setup and height adjustment
  • Flip-open base design allows for easy banner changes and replacements
  • Professional-grade hardware suitable for repeated use

Product Specifications

  • Dimensions: 33.5" W x 80.5" H x 7.75" D
  • Weight: 7.25 lbs for easy transport
  • Material: Professional aluminum construction
  • Base: Low-profile design with flip-open access
  • Note: Banner sold separately
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Telescoping Retractor Hardware Material & Construction Features

Professional aluminum construction ensures your telescoping retractor hardware delivers reliable performance for trade shows, retail displays, and promotional events.

Aluminum Base Construction

Low-profile aluminum base provides stable foundation for banner displays while maintaining portability for event transport.

End-Cap Finish Options

  • Black End-Caps: Professional appearance for corporate and formal events
  • Silver End-Caps: Clean, modern finish suitable for trade shows and retail displays

Telescoping Pole System

Flip-lever telescoping mechanism allows for quick height adjustment and secure locking at desired display height.

Durability Features

Engineered for repeated assembly and disassembly, making this hardware ideal for businesses requiring frequent banner changes and event use.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What banner sizes work with this telescoping retractor hardware?

The hardware accommodates standard retractable banner widths and heights up to 80" tall. Banners are sold separately to provide maximum customization flexibility.

How much does the telescoping retractor hardware weigh?

The complete hardware unit weighs 7.25 lbs, making it easy to transport between events while providing stable banner display.

Can I change banners easily with this hardware?

Yes, the flip-open base design allows for quick banner changes without tools, making it perfect for businesses that need to update displays frequently.

What's the difference between black and silver end-caps?

Both options provide the same functionality. Black end-caps offer a professional corporate appearance, while silver end-caps provide a modern metallic finish.

Is assembly required for the telescoping retractor hardware?

Minimal assembly required. The flip-lever telescoping pole system is designed for quick setup and height adjustment without complex installation procedures.

Can this hardware be used outdoors?

While the aluminum construction is durable, this hardware is primarily designed for indoor use at trade shows, retail locations, and professional events.

What production time should I choose for my event deadline?

Choose 2-day priority for tight timelines, 3-day standard for most orders, or 5-day saver if you're planning ahead and want to save on production costs.

Do you offer volume pricing for multiple hardware units?

Yes, contact our customer service team for volume pricing information on orders of multiple telescoping retractor hardware units.
